articles.description: Nobody can replace the great Gareth Bale, but Harry Wilson is stepping up more than anyone as Wales aim to qualify for the World Cup.
articles.title: Harry Wilson: No-one can replace Gareth Bale but Wales star comes close

articles.description: Manchester United suffered defeat by Bayern Munich in the home leg of their Champions League quarter-final, but manager Marc Skinner refuses to rule them out.
articles.title: Manchester United refuse to give up on Champions League dream

articles.description: Four-time Olympic champion Michael Johnson confirms he will refund a sum of  $500,000 (£375,000) he allegedly "secretly" paid himself before his Grand Slam Track league collapsed.
articles.title: Michael Johnson: Grand Slam Track founder to give back $500,000 payment

articles.description: Italy take on Northern Ireland in Thursday’s World Cup play‑off semi‑final, hoping to move one step closer to ending their lingering qualifying curse.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Could Italy miss out after 'torturous' qualifying campaign?

articles.description: One of the icons of Welsh and Liverpool football has been diagnosed with dementia, his son Cameron Toshack confirms.
articles.title: John Toshack: Wales and Liverpool great diagnosed with dementia

articles.description: Liverpool reporter Aadam Patel analyses what Mohamed Salah's next move might be following the forward's announcement that he is to leave the club this summer.
articles.title: Mohamed Salah: Saudi Pro League, US or Europe - who could sign Liverpool forward?

articles.description: The NBA's board of governors vote to allow the league to explore potential expansion franchises in Seattle and Las Vegas.
articles.title: NBA expansion: Seattle and Las Vegas could host new teams after league board of governors vote

articles.description: Barcelona take control of their Women's Champions League quarter-final with an impressive, dominant away first-leg victory at rivals Real Madrid.
articles.title: Real Madrid 2-6 Barcelona: Barca cruise to Women's Champions League last-eight first-leg win

articles.description: Al-Ittihad rekindle their efforts to sign Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah and Everton forward Iliman Ndiaye is among the players being considered by Manchester United.
articles.title: Football gossip: Salah, Alonso, Olise, Diomande, Ndiaye, Rashford, Bastoni, Vinicius Jr, Vlahovic

articles.description: Elena Rybakina beats Jessica Pegula for a fifth straight time to move into the semi-finals of the Miami Open.
articles.title: Miami Open: Elena Rybakina battles past Jessica Pegula to move into semis
